rows.label: qev065407_MSG0001
rows.name: To think the enemy took my form...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065407_MSG0002
rows.name:
I'm sure I must have left an opening for the enemy
to exploit as well...
I will reflect on this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065407_MSG0003
rows.name:
I would love nothing more than to take action myself, but
I don't want to throw the search into confusion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065407_MSG0004
rows.name: I will stay still right here for a while.[ST:wait ]
